name: aurora-button
title: Aurora Button
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Multi-variant button with aurora glow, rose, neutral, ghost, and destructive styles. Inline-style gradients and box-shadow glows.
docs:
Aurora UI component that installs Aurora Button.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/button.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`.
